requirements.task_name: Add the cheapest double-DIN Apple CarPlay stereo under $400 with 4+ stars to the cart
requirements.task_description: Find car stereos with Apple CarPlay, double-DIN size, at least 4-star rating, priced at $400 or less, sort by price, and add the cheapest matching stereo to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Compare 6.5" component speaker sets and wishlist the one with higher RMS power
requirements.task_description: Find 6.5-inch component speaker sets between $100 and $200 with 4.5+ star ratings, compare the first two, and add the one with the higher RMS power to the wishlist.

requirements.task_name: Build a 3-piece car audio system under $600 using the cheapest 4+ star items
requirements.task_description: Select one car stereo, one speaker set, and one subwoofer, each with at least 4 stars, always choosing the cheapest item in each category, and add them to the cart so the combined subtotal is under $600.

requirements.task_name: Find a 4-channel amplifier with 600W+ RMS under $350 and add the most-reviewed one to the cart
requirements.task_description: Search for car amplifiers, filter to 4-channel models with at least 600W RMS under $350 and 4+ star rating, sort by number of reviews, and add the most-reviewed amplifier to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Add a subwoofer + amplifier bundle with wiring kit, free shipping, and price $250–$450 (quantity 2) to the cart
requirements.task_description: Filter for subwoofer and amplifier bundles priced between $250 and $450 that offer free shipping, choose the first one that clearly includes a wiring kit, and add two units to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Find a Bluetooth stereo with backup camera input that fits a 2018 Honda Civic Sedan under $500 and add the second-cheapest to the cart
requirements.task_description: Use the vehicle fit tool for a 2018 Honda Civic Sedan, filter stereos that fit this vehicle with Bluetooth and backup camera input under $500 and 4+ stars, sort by price, and add the second-cheapest matching stereo to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Choose a premium stereo over $700 with 4.5+ stars, add a 3-year warranty, and proceed with standard shipping at checkout
requirements.task_description: Find a high-end car stereo over $700 with at least 4.5 stars, select a 3-year protection plan, add it to the cart, and at checkout choose standard shipping and enter basic contact details.

requirements.task_name: Add three different installation accessories (wiring kit, dash kit, antenna adapter) under $40 with 4+ stars to the cart
requirements.task_description: Navigate to installation accessories, filter to items under $40 with at least 4 stars, and add one amp wiring kit, one dash kit, and one antenna adapter (all different products) to the cart.
